tui.description: Whether to enable the TUI (Terminal User Interface) mode

tasks.description: The map of tasks to define and run

Task.description: Configuration details for an individual task

working_dir.description: The working directory in which the command(s) should be executed

depends_on.description: A list of task names that this task depends on and must run after

RunCommand.description: A command to run, which can be a single string or an array of strings

anyOf.description: Runs multiple command strings in sequence
